Methanol is injected at the field wellsites to prevent freezing and breakdown hydrates.   Approximately 75% of the methanol that is injected in the field is transferred with the gas, via pipelines, to the plant where it is seperated out with the produced

When the gas reaches the plant, the liquids are seperated out to the produced water tank.  Trace amounts of hydrogen sulphide remain entrained in the produced water.  As a result, the entrained hydrogen sulphide is transferred offsite for underground inje
